title: Monday Vibe Usability

posts.author: cdalbey (Chelsea Dalbey)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I want to be able to reuse my Monday Vibe on multiple boards but have the ability for the data to reset when I do that. Essentially, I don’t want to have to rebuild this every time.

Additionally, I would love to be able to connect multiple boards at the same time to my Monday vibe so I could build out master dashboards via this vibe and modify the data source in setup.

What are you trying to achieve

I am trying to build a roll up executive dashboard with my vibe

Additionally I am trying to save time rebuilding the same vibe multiple times.

posts.author: amichay (Amichay Even Chen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @cdalbey !
I’m Amichay Even Chen from monday
We are about to release the ability to connect vibe to five different boards, it should be available in your account by the end of the month.
We are also working on the ability to reuse vibe apps in different boards, it is planned for early next year.
